mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_employee_project WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT ep.*, e.name as employee_name, p.name as project_name FROM tb_employee_project ep LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON ep.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ep.project_id = p.id WHERE ep.id = #{id}

SELECT ep.*, e.name as employee_name, p.name as project_name FROM tb_employee_project ep LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON ep.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ep.project_id = p.id WHERE ep.employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT ep.*, e.name as employee_name, p.name as project_name, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee_project ep LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON ep.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON ep.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE ep.project_id = #{projectId}
